originalAlarm.description: Value stored to '__driver_data_16' is never read

sanitizedDescription: Value stored to 'driver_data' is never read
reasoning: On the success path of ptmx_open (when nondet() returns false), driver_data = &some_int at L39 is the last use of driver_data before return 0 at L41. driver_data is never read after this assignment. Genuine dead store. No // ERROR at L39 (the // ERROR at L8 marks a different bug on the error path). New bug. PC = CONFIG_UNIX98_PTYS correctly captures when ptmx_open is compiled. No library macros.
